name: Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Green - Spritz™
description:
Brighten up your Easter celebrations with the charming Vintage Plastic Easter Basket Green - Spritz™. Crafted from durable polyethylene, this round basket features a vibrant green hue, perfect for holding treats or decorative items. With a height of 6.5 inches and a 12-inch depth and width, it offers ample space for your Easter goodies. Its classic design makes it a delightful addition to your seasonal decorations

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
